main.description: Let an app mute or unmute its *own* notifications for a user from inside the app. Muted = recorded to the inbox but no alert channels fire. Dual-authenticated like setRouting (app JWT + a user-issued `userToken`). Self-scoped: only ever affects the calling app's own grant.

userToken.description: A user-issued atproto service-auth JWT (com.atproto.server.getServiceAuth) with aud = the relay's DID and lxm = pub.atmo.notify.muteSelf.

muted.description: true = mute this app's notifications; false = unmute.
